---
title: "08_sensitivity_analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and intermediate data
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(ranger)
library(pROC)

merged_clinical_methylation <- read_rds(
  here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_methylation_with_outcome.rds"))

dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Helper functions
#--------------------------------------------------

prop_missing_vec <- function(x) mean(is.na(x))
variance_vec <- function(x) var(x, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Prepare methylation modelling dataset
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_model <- merged_clinical_methylation %>%
  filter(!is.na(survival_500))

meth_model <- meth_model %>%
  mutate(
    survival_500 = factor(survival_500, levels = c("Yes", "No")))

meta_cols <- intersect(
  c(
    "sample_submitter_id",
    "case_submitter_id",
    "case_uuid",
    "project_id",
    "age_at_index",
    "gender",
    "race",
    "ethnicity",
    "days_to_death",
    "days_to_follow_up",
    "survival_500"),
  names(meth_model))

meth_feature_cols <- setdiff(names(meth_model), meta_cols)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Function to build top-N methylation matrix
#--------------------------------------------------

build_top_meth <- function(df, feature_cols, n_features = 2000, missing_cutoff = 0.10) {
  
  meth_missing <- df %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(feature_cols), prop_missing_vec)) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = "feature",
      values_to = "prop_missing")
  
  keep_missing <- meth_missing %>%
    filter(prop_missing <= missing_cutoff) %>%
    pull(feature)
  
  meth_var <- df %>%
    select(all_of(keep_missing)) %>%
    summarise(across(everything(), variance_vec)) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = "feature",
      values_to = "variance")
  
  keep_var <- meth_var %>%
    filter(is.finite(variance), !is.na(variance), variance > 0)
  
  n_keep <- min(n_features, nrow(keep_var))
  
  top_features <- keep_var %>%
    arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
    slice_head(n = n_keep) %>%
    pull(feature)
  
  x <- df %>%
    select(all_of(top_features)) %>%
    mutate(across(
      everything(),
      ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .x)))
  
  list(
    x = x,
    y = df$survival_500,
    features = top_features)
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Function to fit RF under chosen CV design
#--------------------------------------------------

fit_rf_cv <- function(x, y, folds = 5, repeats = 5, seed = 123) {
  
  ctrl <- trainControl(
    method = "repeatedcv",
    number = folds,
    repeats = repeats,
    classProbs = TRUE,
    summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
    savePredictions = "final")
  
  rf_grid <- expand.grid(
    mtry = c(5, 10, 20, 35, 50, 75, 100, 150, 250, 400),
    splitrule = "gini",
    min.node.size = c(1, 3, 5, 10, 15, 20))
  
  set.seed(seed)
  
  model_rf <- train(
    x = x,
    y = y,
    method = "ranger",
    metric = "ROC",
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = rf_grid,
    num.trees = 1000,
    importance = "impurity")
  
  pred_best <- model_rf$pred %>%
    filter(
      mtry == model_rf$bestTune$mtry,
      splitrule == model_rf$bestTune$splitrule,
      min.node.size == model_rf$bestTune$min.node.size)
  
  auc_val <- roc(
    response = pred_best$obs,
    predictor = pred_best$Yes,
    levels = c("No", "Yes"),
    direction = "<")$auc
  
  best_row <- model_rf$results %>%
  filter(
    mtry == model_rf$bestTune$mtry,
    splitrule == model_rf$bestTune$splitrule,
    min.node.size == model_rf$bestTune$min.node.size)
  
  tibble(
  folds = folds,
  repeats = repeats,
  best_mtry = model_rf$bestTune$mtry,
  best_min_node_size = model_rf$bestTune$min.node.size,
  ROC = best_row$ROC,
  Sens = best_row$Sens,
  Spec = best_row$Spec,
  auc = as.numeric(auc_val))
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Sensitivity by feature count
#--------------------------------------------------

feature_counts <- c(1500, 2000, 2500)

sensitivity_feature_results <- map_dfr(feature_counts, function(nf) {
  meth_obj <- build_top_meth(
    df = meth_model,
    feature_cols = meth_feature_cols,
    n_features = nf,
    missing_cutoff = 0.10)
  
  res <- fit_rf_cv(
    x = meth_obj$x,
    y = meth_obj$y,
    folds = 5,
    repeats = 5,
    seed = 123)
  
  res %>%
    mutate(
      scenario = "feature_count",
      feature_count = nf)
})
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Sensitivity by CV design
#--------------------------------------------------

cv_settings <- tribble(
  ~folds, ~repeats,
  3,      5,
  10,     3)

meth_obj_2000 <- build_top_meth(
  df = meth_model,
  feature_cols = meth_feature_cols,
  n_features = 2000,
  missing_cutoff = 0.10)

sensitivity_cv_results <- pmap_dfr(cv_settings, function(folds, repeats) {
  fit_rf_cv(
    x = meth_obj_2000$x,
    y = meth_obj_2000$y,
    folds = folds,
    repeats = repeats,
    seed = 123) %>%
    mutate(
      scenario = "cv_design",
      feature_count = 2000)
})
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Save outputs
#--------------------------------------------------

sensitivity_results <- bind_rows(
  sensitivity_feature_results,
  sensitivity_cv_results) %>%
  mutate(
    setting = case_when(
      scenario == "feature_count" ~ paste0(feature_count, " probes; 5-fold × 5 repeats"),
      scenario == "cv_design" ~ paste0("2000 probes; ", folds, "-fold × ", repeats, " repeats"),
      TRUE ~ scenario))

print(sensitivity_results)

write_csv(
  sensitivity_results,
  here("outputs", "tables", "sensitivity_analysis_results.csv"))
```

```{r}
sensitivity_plot_df <- sensitivity_results %>%
  mutate(
    scenario_label = case_when(
      scenario == "feature_count" ~ paste0(feature_count, " probes"),
      scenario == "cv_design" ~ paste0(folds, "-fold × ", repeats, " repeats"),
      TRUE ~ scenario))

p_sensitivity <- sensitivity_plot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(scenario_label, ROC), y = ROC, fill = scenario)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", ROC)),
    hjust = -0.15,
    colour = "white",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "feature_count" = "#F59E0B",
      "cv_design" = "#19E0E6")) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(sensitivity_plot_df$ROC, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.12)) +
  labs(
    title = "Methylation RF sensitivity analysis",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Cross-validated ROC",
    fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p_sensitivity

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "sensitivity_analysis_rf_methylation.png"),
  plot = p_sensitivity,
  width = 9,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```
